side_effects.description: First cycle: water retention through first 6 weeks when titrating up to 2mg over ~2 months. Second cycle starting at 2mg: water retention for first ~3 weeks then resolved.

protocol_notes: Two cycles completed. First: titrated from low dose up to 2mg over ~2 months. Second: started directly at 2mg. No joint pain or carpal tunnel with either method. Concludes titration prolonged water retention vs jumping straight to 2mg. Recommends staying hydrated with electrolytes.
